vision-glm-fallback-http-500-quality.lastNote: Fallback-only path, but it must be root-caused before relying on Z.AI GLM for vision resilience when Gemini is disabled or unavailable.

vision-gemini-exact-forecast-delta-attri.title: Gemini Vision misattributes exact forecast delta values in the screenshot
